childhood.familyBackground: American entrepreneur from a Jewish background. His family emphasized education and intellectual pursuits.
childhood.familyBackgroundKo: 유대인 배경의 미국 기업가. 그의 가족은 교육과 지적 추구를 강조했다.
childhood.education: University of Pennsylvania (BA), University of Chicago (MBA)
childhood.earlyLife: Asness studied finance and mathematics, developing expertise in quantitative investing. He began his career in institutional finance before founding his own hedge fund.
childhood.earlyLifeKo: 금융과 수학을 공부하여 양적 투자 전문성을 개발했다. 자신의 헤지펀드를 설립하기 전 기관 금융에서 경력을 시작했다.

careerTimeline.event: Founded AQR Capital Management with quantitative investment focus
careerTimeline.eventKo: 양적 투자 중심의 AQR 캐피탈 매니지먼트 설립

careerTimeline.event: Grew AQR to become major global hedge fund

quotes.text: Risk and uncertainty are not the same thing.

personalTraits.knownFor: Founder of AQR Capital Management, pioneer in quantitative and hedge fund investing
personalTraits.knownForKo: AQR 캐피탈 매니지먼트 창립자, 양적 및 헤지펀드 투자 선구자
